tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Laboratory results are overall within normal limits, with only mild elevations in chloride and LDL cholesterol. Glycemic control, renal function, and lipid profile are generally satisfactory for age, with no evidence of proteinuria or significant metabolic disturbances. No acute laboratory concerns identified; recommend routine monitoring and clinical correlation.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
